title: arabis bellidifolia var. subcoriacea
intro: Arabis bellidifolia var. subcoriacea, also known as mountain rock-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Arabis bellidifolia var. subcoriacea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address various health concerns.
